mapper.select:
select count(*) from sys_school_tag where deleted = 0
and tag_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
select id, tag_name from sys_school_tag where deleted = 0 order by tag_name
select id, tag_name from sys_school_tag where id = #{id} and deleted = 0 limit 1
select id, tag_name from sys_school_tag where tag_name = #{tagName} and deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.update: update sys_school_tag set deleted = 1 where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
mapper.select: select count(*) from sys_school_tag_rel where tag_id = #{tagId} and deleted = 0
